critic_coordination-00001.content: Assign each artifact-pair to exactly one critic for cross-checking
critic_coordination-00001.justification: 5 of 18 critics independently found developer-views-status gap — exclusive ownership eliminates convergent duplication
critic_coordination-00001.evidence: Implementation, Logic, Validation, Capability Accuracy, Verification all reported same missing-component gap

critic_coordination-00002.content: Prioritize code-grounded critics over spec-only critics for unique findings
critic_coordination-00002.justification: Accuracy critics reading source code produced highest-value unique findings because codebase grounding prevents duplication
critic_coordination-00002.evidence: Decision Plausibility verified 8/8 decisions with file:line refs; Requirement Accuracy found exit-code mismatch at bin/agentcontainer:230-244

critic_coordination-00003.content: Behavioral edge cases at capability boundaries cause highest duplication
critic_coordination-00003.justification: --rebuild silent-ignore found by 4 critics independently; edge cases sit at intersection of requirements, validation, coverage, and accuracy scopes
critic_coordination-00003.evidence: Requirements Coverage functional-critic-1, Validation REQUIREMENTS-1, Requirement Accuracy STEP-MISMATCH-2, Requirements TESTABILITY-1 all flagged --rebuild precondition gap

critic_output-00004.content: Set per-critic token budgets to prevent truncation of tail findings
critic_output-00004.justification: 8+ critics truncated mid-sentence; later findings tend to be more niche/unique, so truncation disproportionately loses novel insights
critic_output-00004.evidence: Dependency TECHNICAL-2, Technical TECHNICAL-3, Requirements TESTABILITY-3, Verification INFRA-4, Architecture Accuracy TECH-2, Requirement Accuracy MISSING-SCENARIO-1 all end mid-sentence

critic_coverage-00005.content: Add dedicated error-UX critic for user-facing failure paths and exit codes
critic_coverage-00005.justification: No existing critic systematically audited error message completeness — exit-code mismatch found only incidentally by Requirement Accuracy
critic_coverage-00005.evidence: Requirement Accuracy found exit-code 0-vs-1 mismatch incidentally; no critic owned systematic error path audit

critic_coordination-00006.content: Consolidate testability checking into one critic, not split across two
critic_coordination-00006.justification: Integration and Requirements critics both flagged internal function names in Then clauses — same finding class split across critics wastes capacity
critic_coordination-00006.evidence: Requirements TESTABILITY-1 flags cmd_build(); Integration TESTABILITY-1 flags load_config(), image_exists(), find_project_container() — same pattern, two critics

critic_coverage-00007.content: Positive decision verification is uniquely valuable — keep Decision Plausibility critic
critic_coverage-00007.justification: Decision Plausibility verified 8/8 decisions supported with file:line evidence — positive confirmation not duplicated by any gap-finding critic
critic_coverage-00007.evidence: Decision Plausibility table: 8/8 decisions supported with code locations (build.sh:153, up.sh:80-83, config.sh:13-21)
